status_detail: h2_end_stream=1 atomic 2-frame DATA strategy DID change the connection-close signature -- explicit 'ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED 200' from #607 disappeared, replaced by '(canceled)' with zero response headers. Functional outcome IDENTICAL: 0 SSE events delivered, no '보안 경고' warning rendered, frontend shows generic temporary-error popup '일시적인 오류가 발생했어요 / 잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요' with 확인 button (clicking navigates back to home, ending chat). Additional app-promo overlay also appeared. The atomic-DATA strategy fixed the symptom signature but NOT the underlying delivery problem.
request_status: (canceled) -- no Status Code line in DevTools General; Response headers (0)
err_signature_change: from 'ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED 200' (R-27 / 607) to '(canceled)' (this run) -- progress in symptom but same outcome
eventstream_first_event_summary: No events received. Response headers (0) means the server never delivered any HTTP response data over the SSE stream before the connection was aborted.
error_popup_text: 일시적인 오류가 발생했어요 / 잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요 (확인 button)
errors_observed: Network: status (canceled), no response headers, no events
App-promo overlay: 더 편리한 zeta 앱에서 대화를 즐겨보세요
root_cause_hypothesis: Engine is still failing to deliver complete SSE response that frontend can parse -- either response is aborted on engine side BEFORE any DATA frames emitted (clean cancel from client perspective), or body is sent in form that triggers JS-side fetch.abort(). 2-frame atomic write may be truncating the JSON SSE event payload. h2_end_stream=1 fixed the symptom name but not the bug.
recommendation_for_dev: Confirm engine actually wrote response body BEFORE connection close (engine-side log: did first DATA frame leave the wire?).
Check if response Content-Type/SSE framing is correct (text/event-stream + cache-control: no-cache + connection: keep-alive header structure).
Investigate whether 2-frame atomic write is truncating the JSON SSE event payload (maybe SSE event lines need to fit in a single frame, or window-size limits are hit).
Compare wire-level frame bytes between zeta v3 (broken) and a working SSE service (mistral SSE worked in earlier cycles).
Side note: zeta v3 may need engine-level h2_end_stream=2 with adjusted timing instead of switching strategy entirely.
notes: Cycle 95 R-4 -- zeta atomic 2-frame H2 strategy verify. FAIL but NOT a no-progress regression -- symptom signature changed (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED -> canceled), suggesting partial improvement. Now need engine-side instrumentation to see if any DATA bytes left the engine. Subagent 6m, exceeded 5min soft, within 8min hard.
